title: Child Protection and Care Services Program Educational Objectives
content:
Child Protection and Care Services Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To educate individuals who can interpret and evaluate data using the basic knowledge and skills acquired in the field with sufficient background in education and care services for disadvantaged children and develop solutions that can identify problems.

2. A foreigner who can effectively use the methods, technical services and technologies that are required for applications related to the field, who can use them effectively, can solve the unforeseen problems encountered in the applications, take responsibility in the working groups or have the ability to work individually, communicate effectively, tolerate, to train professional staff with language skills.

3. Also; knowledge, skill, competence and awareness in the field of security, health and environmental protection, with universal, cultural values, professional ethical competence and consciousness, individual and professional life-long learning awareness, and sectoral developments in science and technology and constantly renewing themselves to raise individuals.
